name: Code Cleanups

tasks.title: Replace indexOf with bytes.IndexByte
tasks.body: In internal/logrender/reader.go, the hand-rolled indexOf function (lines ~243-251) reimplements bytes.IndexByte. Replace the single call site (line ~219) with bytes.IndexByte(data[consumed:], '\n'), add 'bytes' to the import block, and delete the indexOf function. Update or remove any tests that exercise indexOf directly.

tasks.title: Remove stageLabels identity map
tasks.body: In internal/logrender/record.go, the stageLabels map (lines ~31-39) maps every key to itself. The StageLabel() method (lines ~41-47) does a lookup and falls back to r.Stage on miss, which means the map is a no-op: it returns the same value for known stages as the fallback does for unknown stages. Delete the stageLabels map variable and simplify StageLabel() to just 'return r.Stage'. Update record_test.go TestStageLabel accordingly: the test table can shrink since there is no longer a distinction between known/unknown stages, but keep at least one case verifying that StageLabel returns the raw Stage value.

tasks.title: Remove expectContains test helper
Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Code Cleanups is complete and correct

audit_enrichment: Verify bytes.IndexByte is imported and used instead of a local indexOf function. Verify no stageLabels variable exists in record.go. Verify no expectContains function exists in interleaved_test.go. Run go test ./internal/logrender/... and confirm all tests pass.

breadcrumbs.text: Replaced hand-rolled indexOf with bytes.IndexByte in reader.go, deleted the indexOf function, added bytes import. Build and tests pass.
Removed stageLabels identity map from record.go, simplified StageLabel() to return r.Stage directly, trimmed TestStageLabel to 3 cases. Build and tests pass.
Inlined all 21 expectContains call sites in interleaved_test.go with direct strings.Contains checks, deleted the helper. Build and tests pass.

Audit reviewed 4 files (reader.go, record.go, record_test.go, interleaved_test.go). PASS. One finding: reader.go was missing a trailing newline after the indexOf deletion, caught by gofmt. Fixed and committed. All three prior tasks were clean mechanical transformations: bytes.IndexByte replaced a hand-rolled indexOf, the stageLabels identity map was removed in favor of a direct return, and 21 expectContains call sites were inlined. No dead code, no unused imports, no discarded errors, no regressions. go vet and full test suite clean.

audit.result_summary: Three mechanical cleanups completed: replaced a hand-rolled indexOf byte search with bytes.IndexByte, removed an identity stageLabels map in favor of a direct return, and inlined 21 expectContains test-helper call sites. All changes are zero-behavioral-impact simplifications. Audit found and fixed one formatting issue (missing trailing newline in reader.go). Build, tests, go vet, and gofmt all pass clean.

audit.objective: Verify all code-cleanups work is complete, correct, and high-quality
audit.what_happened: Reviewed the 4 files touched by the 3 prior tasks. Build, tests, and go vet all pass. Found one formatting issue: reader.go lacked a trailing newline after the indexOf function was deleted. Fixed and committed. Confirmed no remnants of deleted code (indexOf, stageLabels, expectContains) remain anywhere in the package.
went_well: All three cleanups were genuinely mechanical with zero behavioral change
Test suite covers the affected code paths well; no gaps exposed
improvements: The missing-newline issue could have been caught by running gofmt before committing task-0001

task-0001.objective: Replace the hand-rolled indexOf helper with the standard library's bytes.IndexByte
task-0001.what_happened: Replaced the single call site in readNewLines (line ~219) with bytes.IndexByte, added the bytes import, and deleted the 9-line indexOf function. No tests referenced indexOf directly, so no test changes were needed.
went_well: Drop-in replacement; zero behavioral change, confirmed by passing test suite
improvements: None; this was a straightforward stdlib substitution

task-0002.objective: Remove the identity stageLabels map and simplify StageLabel() to a direct return
task-0002.what_happened: Deleted the stageLabels map variable (8 lines) and replaced the StageLabel() method body with a single return r.Stage. Trimmed the TestStageLabel table from 8 cases to 3 representative ones (known stage, arbitrary stage, empty string).
went_well: Straightforward deletion with zero behavioral change; all existing tests pass without modification beyond the test table trim
improvements: None; this was a dead-code removal

task-0003.objective: Inline and remove the expectContains test helper from interleaved_test.go
task-0003.what_happened: Replaced all 21 call sites of expectContains(t, got, want) with inline if-checks using strings.Contains, preserving the same error message format. Deleted the 8-line helper function definition.
went_well: Mechanical replacement with zero behavioral change; all 85 logrender tests pass
